name: GKE Network Policy Enabled
description: GKE clusters should have network policy enabled to control traffic flow between pods and implement microsegmentation
remediation: Enable network policy on the GKE cluster. Note: This requires recreating node pools
remediation_steps: For existing clusters: gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --update-addons=NetworkPolicy=ENABLED
For new clusters: gcloud container clusters create CLUSTER_NAME --enable-network-policy
Create NetworkPolicy resources to define allowed traffic flows
